---
title: "About"
---

This blog covers the [Open Knowledge Format (OKF)](https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/knowledge-catalog)
and **[okf-ingest](https://github.com/travisjakel/okf-ingest)** — an open-source tool
that reads, validates, and loads OKF bundles into a portable, semantically-searchable
DuckDB catalog, from both R and Python.

Written by Travis Jakel. Posts are syndicated on
[R-bloggers](https://www.r-bloggers.com/) and [Planet Python](https://planetpython.org/).
